productDisplayName: Lotto Men's Classe White Navy Shoe
description: An excellent combination of superior technology and style, from lotto will keep your feet dry and comfortable all day. Slip into these shoes during your training sessions or chill in them while out with your friends.Upper Synthetic and perforated upper for extended durability and to keep the feet fresh and dry all day Synthetic lace for snug Fit Cushioned collar and padded tongue for extremely comfortable grip on the foot Extended rubber outsole embedded onto the toe box for superior sock absorption Padded sock liner for snug fit and comfort grip Midsole EVA injected midsole for light weight feel and high shock absorption Outsole Carbon rubber outsole with herring bone patterns for enhanced grip on any terrain Pivot points below the toe counter to facilitate natural movement of the feet Wash careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
